transition.intent: Move from container-side-channels only after the first image-container analyzer package is implemented, tested, and the frontend/Rust boundary remains safe for local files.
transition.decision_rule: All required gates must be passed, machine-checkable, or waived before changing current_phase.

phase_model.purpose: Implement the first image-container analyzer package for JPEG and PNG side-channel evidence.
blocked_work: product direction lock-in outside the selected analyzer package
exit_criteria: Rust analyzer tests cover the package

phase_model.purpose: Add the next audio-focused analyzer package after image-container analysis is stable.
blocked_work: broad media pipeline rewrites before Rust-side ingestion is selected

phase_model.purpose: Move large media ingestion to Rust-side file handling.
blocked_work: cloud upload or external service dependencies
exit_criteria: frontend no longer sends large byte arrays over IPC
command-level tests cover attach and analyze behavior

phase_model.purpose: Prepare the desktop app for a public-safe release handoff.
blocked_work: new analyzer families without a selected phase

required_gates.description: The existing frontend build command must pass.
Rust analyzer tests must exist for the selected container-side-channel package.
required_gates.on_failure: Stay in container-side-channels and add focused Rust analyzer tests.

required_gates.description: The JPEG COM/APPn/EXIF/XMP/IPTC/after-EOI analyzer must exist.
required_gates.on_failure: Implement the JPEG segment analyzer before phase transition.

required_gates.description: The PNG zTXt/iTXt and after-IEND scan must exist.
required_gates.on_failure: Implement the PNG deep container scan before phase transition.
